mapper.sql: select paper_id, paper_name, course_id, paper_type, total_score, duration_minutes, status from sc_exam_paper
mapper.select: and course_id = #{courseId}and paper_name like concat('%', #{paperName}, '%')and paper_type = #{paperType}and status = #{status} order by paper_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into sc_exam_paper(paper_name, course_id, paper_type, total_score, duration_minutes, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{paperName}, #{courseId}, #{paperType}, #{totalScore}, #{durationMinutes}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update sc_exam_paper paper_name = #{paperName},course_id = #{courseId},paper_type = #{paperType},total_score = #{totalScore},duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes},status = #{status},update_by = #{updateBy},remark = #{remark},update_time = sysdate() where paper_id = #{paperId}
mapper.delete: delete from sc_exam_paper where paper_id in #{paperId}
